name: com.distantlands.zephyr

samples.description: Contains all art used throughout the rest of the samples
Simple scene setup with all wind zones available to test
Watch a projectile blow around vegetation in this simple demo
See how to connect an animator component to Zephyr in this demo
See how to connect a cloth component to Zephyr in this demo
See how to connect a shuriken component to Zephyr in this demo
See how to connect a rigidbody component to Zephyr in this demo
See how to connect a VFX Graph to Zephyr in this demo

description: Unified wind that can be used for every system in your project. Applies the same way on the CPU and GPU so it works on both C# scripts and shaders.
